---
title: ""
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
    resources:
      - shinylive-sw.js
      - data/roborev/latest.json
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 900

# WebR bundles rlang 1.1.6. dplyr 1.2.1/echarts4r need rlang >= 1.1.7.
# Solution: use base R + JS ECharts (no dplyr/echarts4r).
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(jsonlite)

# --- Helpers ------------------------------------------------------------------
ec <- function(option, h = "300px", aria_label = "Interactive chart") {
  id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
  j <- toJSON(option, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")
  tagList(
    tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", role = "button", `aria-label` = aria_label,
             tabindex = "0",
             style = paste0("width:100%;height:", h, ";cursor:zoom-in")),
    tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id,
      "'),'dark');c.setOption(", j, ");new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
      ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'));",
      "function fs(){var url=c.getDataURL({type:'png',pixelRatio:2,backgroundColor:'#000'});",
      "var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.className='fullscreen-overlay';",
      "var img=document.createElement('img');img.src=url;ov.appendChild(img);",
      "ov.onclick=function(){ov.remove()};document.body.appendChild(ov)}",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('click',fs);",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){",
      "if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();fs()}})})();"
    )))
  )
}

ec_empty <- function(msg = "No data available", h = "300px") {
  ec(list(title = list(text = msg, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 14)),
          grid = list(containLabel = TRUE)), h, aria_label = msg)
}

ec_line <- function(dates, series, h = "300px", y_name = NULL,
                    aria_label = "Line chart", default_window_days = 90) {
  y_axis <- list(type = "value", scale = TRUE)
  if (!is.null(y_name)) y_axis$name <- y_name
  dz_start <- 0
  if (length(dates) > 1) {
    d_dates <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(dates)), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(d_dates) && !all(is.na(d_dates))) {
      total_days <- as.numeric(max(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE) - min(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.na(total_days) && total_days > default_window_days) {
        dz_start <- round(100 * (1 - default_window_days / total_days))
      }
    }
  }
  ec(list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
    legend = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
    toolbox = list(feature = list(
      dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
      restore = list(),
      saveAsImage = list()
    )),
    dataZoom = list(
      list(type = "inside", start = dz_start, end = 100, filterMode = "filter"),
      list(type = "slider", start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5, filterMode = "filter")
    ),
    grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
    xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(as.character(dates))),
    yAxis = y_axis,
    series = series
  ), h, aria_label = aria_label)
}

has_rows <- function(x) is.data.frame(x) && nrow(x) > 0

# NULL-coalescing operator — defined early so helpers and server can use it
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b

# --- Data loading -------------------------------------------------------------
# Origin-absolute path so WebR Worker resolves correctly on GH Pages.
# The fixture at tests/testthat/fixtures/roborev_daily_sample.json is copied
# to vignettes/data/roborev/latest.json by export_dashboard_data.R (section 8g).
base_url <- "/llmtelemetry/data/"

load_json <- function(filename) {
  tryCatch({
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")
    download.file(paste0(base_url, filename), tmp, mode = "w", quiet = TRUE)
    fromJSON(txt = tmp, simplifyDataFrame = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Failed to load ", filename, ": ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
}

raw <- load_json("roborev/latest.json")

# --- UI -----------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- page_navbar(
  title = tags$span(
    tags$a(href = "dashboard_shinylive.html",
           style = "color:#7cb5ec;text-decoration:none;margin-right:12px;font-size:0.85em;",
           "← Dashboard"),
    "Roborev Resolution"
  ),
  theme = bs_theme(
    bg = "#1a1a1a", fg = "#e0e0e0",
    primary = "#377eb8", secondary = "#555555",
    font_scale = 0.85
  ),
  header = tagList(
    tags$script(src = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5/dist/echarts.min.js"),
    tags$style(HTML("
      .kpi-table { width: 100%; font-size: 0.82em; }
      .kpi-table td, .kpi-table th { padding: 3px 8px; }
      .kpi-table td:last-child { text-align: right; font-weight: bold; }
      .section-hdr { color: #4ea8de; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: 600;
                     border-bottom: 1px solid #333; padding-bottom: 3px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
      .delta-pos { color: #69d4a0; }
      .delta-neg { color: #f08080; }
      .delta-neu { color: #ccc; }
      .outlier-sev-critical { color: #f08080; font-weight: bold; }
      .outlier-sev-high { color: #ffd93d; }
      .outlier-sev-medium { color: #a0c8ff; }
      .fullscreen-overlay {
        position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh;
        background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92); z-index: 99999; display: flex;
        align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: zoom-out;
      }
      .fullscreen-overlay img { max-width: 95vw; max-height: 95vh; object-fit: contain; }
    "))
  ),
  # Window selector in header area
  nav_panel("Resolution", value = "Resolution",
    layout_sidebar(
      sidebar = sidebar(
        width = 200,
        div(class = "section-hdr", "Window"),
        radioButtons("window_sel", label = NULL,
          choices = c("1d" = "1d", "3d" = "3d", "7d" = "7d", "14d" = "14d"),
          selected = "7d"
        ),
        hr(style = "border-color:#333"),
        div(class = "section-hdr", "Links"),
        tags$a(href = "dashboard_shinylive.html", style = "color:#7cb5ec;font-size:0.82em;",
               "← Main Dashboard"),
        br(),
        tags$a(href = "roborev_summary.html", style = "color:#7cb5ec;font-size:0.82em;",
               "Review Summary")
      ),
      # Main content
      fluidRow(
        # Headline KPI strip
        column(12,
          div(class = "section-hdr", style = "font-size:1em;", "Headline KPIs"),
          div(style = "margin-bottom:12px;",
            tableOutput("headline_kpis")
          )
        )
      ),
      fluidRow(
        # Section 1: Frequency × Verdict (Cleveland dot chart)
        column(6,
          div(class = "section-hdr", "§ 1 — Frequency × Verdict"),
          p(style = "color:#aaa;font-size:0.8em;margin-bottom:4px;",
            "Review count broken down by verdict. ",
            "Each dot is a verdict category. Dot position = count."),
          uiOutput("s1_verdict_chart")
        ),
        # Section 1b: Severity breakdown
        column(6,
          div(class = "section-hdr", "§ 1b — Severity Breakdown"),
          p(style = "color:#aaa;font-size:0.8em;margin-bottom:4px;",
            "Open + closed reviews split by severity for the selected window."),
          uiOutput("s1_severity_chart")
        )
      ),
      fluidRow(
        # Section 2: Time-to-close (p50/p90/p99 + time series)
        column(6,
          div(class = "section-hdr", "§ 2 — Time to Close"),
          div(style = "margin-bottom:8px;", tableOutput("s2_ttc_table")),
          p(style = "color:#aaa;font-size:0.8em;margin-bottom:4px;",
            "Daily opened vs closed with cumulative open count (range slider defaults to last 90 days)."),
          uiOutput("s2_timeseries_chart")
        ),
        # Section 3: Trends delta table
        column(6,
          div(class = "section-hdr", "§ 3 — Trends vs Prior Period"),
          p(style = "color:#aaa;font-size:0.8em;margin-bottom:4px;",
            "7-day window vs prior 7 days. Green = improved, red = worsened."),
          tableOutput("s3_trends_table"),
          div(class = "section-hdr", style = "margin-top:12px;",
              "§ 3b — Resolution Rate Dot"),
          p(style = "color:#aaa;font-size:0.8em;margin-bottom:4px;",
            "Resolution rate for 1d / 3d / 7d / 14d windows at a glance."),
          uiOutput("s3_rate_chart")
        )
      ),
      fluidRow(
        # Section 4: Outliers table
        column(12,
          div(class = "section-hdr", "§ 4 — Outliers (Longest Open)"),
          p(style = "color:#aaa;font-size:0.8em;margin-bottom:4px;",
            "Reviews open the longest in the selected window, ranked by hours open."),
          tableOutput("s4_outliers_table")
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

# --- Server -------------------------------------------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # Reactive: selected window data
  win_data <- reactive({
    w <- input$window_sel
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw) || is.null(raw$windows)) return(NULL)
    raw$windows[[w]]
  })

  # Helper: format delta with colour class
  fmt_delta <- function(val, reverse = FALSE) {
    if (is.null(val) || is.na(val)) return(tags$span(class = "delta-neu", "—"))
    is_pos <- as.numeric(val) > 0
    is_neg <- as.numeric(val) < 0
    cls <- if (reverse) {
      if (is_pos) "delta-neg" else if (is_neg) "delta-pos" else "delta-neu"
    } else {
      if (is_pos) "delta-pos" else if (is_neg) "delta-neg" else "delta-neu"
    }
    prefix <- if (is_pos) "+" else ""
    tags$span(class = cls, paste0(prefix, val))
  }

  # Headline KPIs table
  output$headline_kpis <- renderTable({
    w <- win_data()
    if (is.null(w)) return(data.frame(Metric = "No data", Value = "—"))
    label <- if (!is.null(w$label)) w$label else input$window_sel
    data.frame(
      Metric = c("Window", "Total Reviews", "Closed", "Open",
                 "Resolution Rate", "Median Hours to Close",
                 "p90 Hours to Close", "p99 Hours to Close"),
      Value  = c(
        label,
        as.character(w$total_reviews %||% "—"),
        as.character(w$total_closed %||% "—"),
        as.character((w$total_reviews %||% 0) - (w$total_closed %||% 0)),
        if (!is.null(w$resolution_rate)) paste0(round(w$resolution_rate * 100, 1), "%") else "—",
        if (!is.null(w$median_hours_to_close)) paste0(round(w$median_hours_to_close, 1), " h") else "—",
        if (!is.null(w$p90_hours_to_close)) paste0(round(w$p90_hours_to_close, 1), " h") else "—",
        if (!is.null(w$p99_hours_to_close)) paste0(round(w$p99_hours_to_close, 1), " h") else "—"
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = FALSE, spacing = "xs",
     rownames = FALSE, width = "100%",
     sanitize.text.function = function(x) x,
     sanitize.colnames.function = function(x) x)

  # Section 1: Verdict Cleveland dot chart
  output$s1_verdict_chart <- renderUI({
    w <- win_data()
    if (is.null(w) || is.null(w$by_verdict)) return(ec_empty("No verdict data", "220px"))
    vd <- w$by_verdict
    if (!is.data.frame(vd) || nrow(vd) == 0) return(ec_empty("No verdict data", "220px"))
    # Sort descending by n
    vd <- vd[order(-vd$n), ]
    color_map <- c(fixed = "#69d4a0", wontfix = "#ffd93d", open = "#f08080")
    colors <- vapply(vd$verdict, function(v) {
      if (v %in% names(color_map)) color_map[[v]] else "#aaa"
    }, character(1))
    # Cleveland dot chart: scatter on horizontal axis, category on y
    ec(list(
      grid = list(left = 90, right = 40, containLabel = FALSE),
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "item",
        formatter = "function(p){return p.name+': '+p.value+' reviews'}"
      ),
      xAxis = list(
        type = "value", name = "Reviews", nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 28,
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type = "category", data = I(rev(vd$verdict)),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 11)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter",
        data = I(as.list(rev(vd$n))),
        symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle = list(color = I(rev(colors)))
      ))
    ), h = "220px", aria_label = "Verdict breakdown dot chart")
  })

  # Section 1b: Severity breakdown Cleveland dot chart
  output$s1_severity_chart <- renderUI({
    w <- win_data()
    if (is.null(w) || is.null(w$severity_counts)) return(ec_empty("No severity data", "220px"))
    sc <- w$severity_counts
    if (!is.list(sc)) return(ec_empty("No severity data", "220px"))
    sevs <- c("critical", "high", "medium", "low")
    counts <- sapply(sevs, function(s) if (!is.null(sc[[s]])) as.numeric(sc[[s]]) else 0)
    # Only keep non-zero
    keep <- counts > 0
    if (!any(keep)) return(ec_empty("No severity data", "220px"))
    sev_labels <- sevs[keep]
    sev_vals   <- counts[keep]
    sev_colors <- c(critical = "#f08080", high = "#ffd93d", medium = "#a0c8ff", low = "#69d4a0")
    colors_used <- vapply(sev_labels, function(s) sev_colors[[s]], character(1))
    ec(list(
      grid = list(left = 90, right = 40, containLabel = FALSE),
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "item",
        formatter = "function(p){return p.name+': '+p.value+' reviews'}"
      ),
      xAxis = list(
        type = "value", name = "Reviews", nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 28,
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type = "category", data = I(rev(sev_labels)),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 11)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter",
        data = I(as.list(rev(sev_vals))),
        symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle = list(color = I(rev(colors_used)))
      ))
    ), h = "220px", aria_label = "Severity breakdown dot chart")
  })

  # Section 2: Time-to-close KPI table
  output$s2_ttc_table <- renderTable({
    w <- win_data()
    if (is.null(w)) return(data.frame(Percentile = "—", Hours = "—"))
    data.frame(
      Percentile = c("p50 (median)", "p90", "p99"),
      `Hours to close` = c(
        if (!is.null(w$median_hours_to_close)) paste0(round(w$median_hours_to_close, 1), " h") else "—",
        if (!is.null(w$p90_hours_to_close)) paste0(round(w$p90_hours_to_close, 1), " h") else "—",
        if (!is.null(w$p99_hours_to_close)) paste0(round(w$p99_hours_to_close, 1), " h") else "—"
      ),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
      check.names = FALSE
    )
  }, striped = FALSE, hover = TRUE, bordered = FALSE, spacing = "xs",
     rownames = FALSE, width = "100%")

  # Section 2: Time-series chart (opened/closed/cumulative open)
  output$s2_timeseries_chart <- renderUI({
    if (is.null(raw) || is.null(raw$time_series)) return(ec_empty("No time series data", "260px"))
    ts <- raw$time_series
    if (!is.data.frame(ts) || nrow(ts) == 0) return(ec_empty("No time series data", "260px"))
    dates  <- ts$date
    opened <- as.numeric(ts$opened)
    closed <- as.numeric(ts$closed)
    cumopen <- if ("cumulative_open" %in% names(ts)) as.numeric(ts$cumulative_open) else NULL
    series <- list(
      list(name = "Opened", type = "bar", data = I(opened),
           itemStyle = list(color = "#f08080")),
      list(name = "Closed", type = "bar", data = I(closed),
           itemStyle = list(color = "#69d4a0"))
    )
    if (!is.null(cumopen)) {
      series <- c(series, list(list(
        name = "Cumulative open", type = "line", data = I(cumopen),
        yAxisIndex = 1L,
        itemStyle = list(color = "#ffd93d"),
        lineStyle = list(width = 2, type = "dashed")
      )))
    }
    y_axes <- list(
      list(type = "value", name = "Reviews/day", nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
           axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc")),
      list(type = "value", name = "Cumulative open", position = "right",
           nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"), axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc"))
    )
    # Compute dataZoom start to default last 90 days
    dz_start <- 0
    d_dates <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(dates)), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(d_dates) && !all(is.na(d_dates))) {
      total_days <- as.numeric(max(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE) - min(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.na(total_days) && total_days > 90) {
        dz_start <- round(100 * (1 - 90 / total_days))
      }
    }
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      legend = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
        restore = list(),
        saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", start = dz_start, end = 100, filterMode = "filter"),
        list(type = "slider", start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5, filterMode = "filter")
      ),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
      xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(as.character(dates))),
      yAxis = y_axes,
      series = series
    ), h = "260px", aria_label = "Daily opened vs closed reviews with cumulative open count")
  })

  # Section 3: Trends table
  output$s3_trends_table <- renderTable({
    if (is.null(raw) || is.null(raw$trends)) {
      return(data.frame(Metric = "No trend data", Delta = "—"))
    }
    tr <- raw$trends
    rows <- list(
      list(metric = "Resolution rate (7d vs prior 7d)",
           val = tr$resolution_rate_delta_7d_vs_prior7d,
           format_fn = function(v) paste0(if (v > 0) "+" else "", round(v * 100, 1), " pp"),
           reverse = FALSE),
      list(metric = "Median time-to-close (7d vs prior 7d)",
           val = tr$median_hours_delta_7d_vs_prior7d,
           format_fn = function(v) paste0(if (v > 0) "+" else "", round(v, 1), " h"),
           reverse = TRUE),
      list(metric = "Open critical (7d vs prior 7d)",
           val = tr$open_critical_delta_7d_vs_prior7d,
           format_fn = function(v) paste0(if (v > 0) "+" else "", as.integer(v)),
           reverse = TRUE),
      list(metric = "Open high (7d vs prior 7d)",
           val = tr$open_high_delta_7d_vs_prior7d,
           format_fn = function(v) paste0(if (v > 0) "+" else "", as.integer(v)),
           reverse = TRUE)
    )
    vals <- sapply(rows, function(r) {
      if (is.null(r$val) || is.na(r$val)) "—" else r$format_fn(as.numeric(r$val))
    })
    data.frame(
      Metric = sapply(rows, `[[`, "metric"),
      Delta  = vals,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = FALSE, spacing = "xs",
     rownames = FALSE, width = "100%")

  # Section 3b: Resolution rate dot chart (one dot per window)
  output$s3_rate_chart <- renderUI({
    if (is.null(raw) || is.null(raw$windows)) return(ec_empty("No window data", "180px"))
    wins <- c("1d", "3d", "7d", "14d")
    rates <- sapply(wins, function(w) {
      wd <- raw$windows[[w]]
      if (!is.null(wd) && !is.null(wd$resolution_rate)) round(wd$resolution_rate * 100, 1) else NA_real_
    })
    keep <- !is.na(rates)
    if (!any(keep)) return(ec_empty("No window data", "180px"))
    win_labels <- wins[keep]
    rate_vals  <- rates[keep]
    # Colour: green >= 60%, amber >= 40%, red < 40%
    colors <- ifelse(rate_vals >= 60, "#69d4a0", ifelse(rate_vals >= 40, "#ffd93d", "#f08080"))
    ec(list(
      grid = list(left = 60, right = 60, containLabel = FALSE),
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "item",
        formatter = "function(p){return p.name+': '+p.value+'%'}"
      ),
      xAxis = list(
        type = "value", min = 0, max = 100,
        name = "Resolution %", nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 28,
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", formatter = "{value}%"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type = "category", data = I(rev(win_labels)),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 11)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type = "scatter",
        data = I(as.list(rev(rate_vals))),
        symbolSize = 16,
        itemStyle = list(color = I(rev(colors)))
      ))
    ), h = "180px", aria_label = "Resolution rate by window dot chart")
  })

  # Section 4: Outliers table
  output$s4_outliers_table <- renderTable({
    w <- win_data()
    if (is.null(w) || is.null(w$outliers)) {
      return(data.frame(Message = "No outliers in this window"))
    }
    ol <- w$outliers
    if (!is.data.frame(ol) || nrow(ol) == 0) {
      return(data.frame(Message = "No outliers in this window"))
    }
    # Build display table
    data.frame(
      `Review ID`    = ol$review_id %||% "",
      Repo           = ol$repo %||% "",
      File           = ol$file %||% "",
      Severity       = ol$severity %||% "",
      `Hours open`   = if ("hours_open" %in% names(ol)) paste0(round(ol$hours_open, 1), " h") else "—",
      Verdict        = ol$verdict %||% "",
      Summary        = ol$summary %||% "",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
      check.names = FALSE
    )
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = FALSE, spacing = "xs",
     rownames = FALSE, width = "100%",
     sanitize.text.function = function(x) x)
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
